en: One of the things that Maya and I found when we were writing this paper we were looking at the discourse that precedes genocide
ko: 마야와 제가 이 논문을 쓸 때 발견한 것 중 하나는 집단학살에 선행하는 담론을

en: The enhancement of a sense of victimization on the part of one of the groups usually the group that's going to commit the
ko: 한 집단, 보통 학살을 저지르는 집단의 피해 의식이

en: genocide First of all their sense of being victims is much heightened by the demagogues who
ko: 강화된다는 겁니다. 그들의 피해 의식은 선동가들에 의해 크게 고조되는데

en: are trying to stir up this sort of hatred So they basically say look you've been oppressed in a variety of ways and these are the
ko: 이런 종류의 증오를 부추기는 거죠. 기본적으로 여러 방식으로 억압받아왔고 그걸 한 사람들이 바로 저들이며

en: people who did it and they're not going to stop doing it And this time we're going to get them before they get us
ko: 앞으로도 계속할 거라고. 이번에는 당하기 전에 먼저 하겠다고

en: It's something like that And so there's something very pathological about the enhancement of victimization which is
ko: 비슷한 거죠. 피해 의식의 강화에는 매우 병리적인 면이 있는데

en: See the problem as far as I'm concerned with it is it's not thought
through very well Because there's a point that's being made
ko: 안 한다는 거예요. 왜냐하면 주장되는 요점이 있는데

en: and the point is that people have been oppressed and they suffer
ko: 그 요점은 사람들이 억압받았고 고통받는다는 거거든요
